summary: Iteration 70 - 'Valider sans modifier' button feature. All features working correctly: (1) New green 'Valider sans modifier' button appears next to amber 'Première validation' button on pending expenses. (2) Clicking shows confirm dialog with expense description and article count. (3) If lines are struck, dialog shows warning '⚠ Vous avez coché des lignes à rayer — elles seront prises en compte. Pour modifier davantage, utilisez plutôt Première validation.' (4) Confirming changes status directly from pending → approved (skipping admin_review). (5) Approved expense has NO original_items (no audit trail since nothing was modified). (6) 'Première validation' button still works (pending → admin_review with original_items preserved). (7) All other buttons (Refuser, Supprimer) continue to work.
critical_code_review_comments: AchatsTab.jsx lines 184-213: handleApproveDirectly function correctly builds confirm message with article count and struck lines warning, sends status='approved' directly without setting original_items.
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1054-1063: New 'Valider sans modifier' button with correct data-testid='direct-approve-btn-{id}', green styling (bg-green-600), Truck icon, and proper title tooltip.
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1044-1053: 'Première validation' button preserved with amber styling (bg-amber-600) and correct data-testid='first-validate-btn-{id}'.
Both buttons coexist side-by-side in the button row for pending expenses, providing admin with choice between quick approval or detailed review.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Iter70_Liste_Achats and TEST_Iter70_Premiere_Validation expenses for testing, deleted after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 70 added 'Valider sans modifier' button for direct approval of pending expenses without going through admin_review. Button has data-testid='direct-approve-btn-{id}' and green styling. Clicking shows confirm dialog with preview. If lines are struck, shows warning. Confirming sends status='approved' directly. Expense approved this way has NO original_items. 'Première validation' button (data-testid='first-validate-btn-{id}') still works for pending → admin_review flow.
